name: Microsoft Advertising
description: Microsoft Advertising (formerly Bing Ads) v13 — Customer Management, Campaign Management, Bulk, and Reporting services. The Bing Ads API is primarily SOAP; these tools call the REST/JSON edge plus customer-management OData endpoints. OAuth2 via Microsoft identity (login.microsoftonline.com), Developer Token required for every call.

credential_fields.name: developer_token
credential_fields.label: Developer Token
credential_fields.description: Required on every Bing Ads API request. Apply at https://developers.ads.microsoft.com/.

credential_fields.name: customer_id
credential_fields.label: CustomerId
credential_fields.description: Manager (Customer) ID — sent in the CustomerId header

credential_fields.name: account_id
credential_fields.label: CustomerAccountId
credential_fields.description: Default Account ID — sent in the CustomerAccountId header

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user (Customer Management). UserId=0 returns the current user. Returns user info, customer roles, and accessible accounts.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List accounts the authenticated user can access. Use SearchAccounts with optional Predicates to filter by name, AccountLifeCycleStatus, or ParentCustomerId. Ordering and Pagination supported.

tools.name: get_campaigns_by_account
tools.description: Get all campaigns under an account. CampaignType is a flags string: 'Search Shopping DynamicSearchAds Audience'.

tools.name: add_campaigns
tools.description: Add one or more campaigns. Each campaign requires Name, BudgetType (DailyBudgetStandard|DailyBudgetAccelerated|MonthlyBudgetSpendUntilDepleted), DailyBudget, Languages, TimeZone, Status (Active|Paused), CampaignType (Search|Shopping|DynamicSearchAds|Audience).

tools.name: update_campaigns
tools.description: Update one or more campaigns. Pass full Campaign objects with Id set. Fields not specified are left unchanged when UpdateAuditInfo=false.

tools.name: get_ad_groups_by_campaign
tools.description: Get all ad groups under a campaign.

tools.name: add_ad_groups
tools.description: Add one or more ad groups under a campaign. Each ad group requires Name, StartDate, EndDate, Language, CpcBid, AdRotation, Status, Network.

tools.name: get_ads_by_ad_group
tools.description: Get all ads under an ad group. AdTypes is a flags string e.g. 'Text ResponsiveSearch ProductAd App ExpandedText DynamicSearch ResponsiveAd'.

tools.name: add_keywords
tools.description: Add keywords to an ad group. Each keyword requires Text, MatchType (Broad|Phrase|Exact), Status; optional Bid, Param1/2/3, FinalUrls.

tools.name: submit_report
tools.description: Queue a performance report (Reporting service). ReportRequest selects type — KeywordPerformanceReportRequest, CampaignPerformanceReportRequest, AdPerformanceReportRequest, AccountPerformanceReportRequest, AdGroupPerformanceReportRequest. Specify Aggregation (Daily|Hourly|Weekly|Monthly|Summary), Time (date range or LastSevenDays etc.), Columns (string array of metrics).

ReportRequest.description: Typed report request with @odata.type field, e.g. "#Microsoft.Advertising.Reporting.Api.CampaignPerformanceReportRequest"

tools.name: poll_report
tools.description: Poll a queued report request by ReportRequestId until Status=Success, then download from ReportDownloadUrl.
